get.description: Retrieve a list of recordings associated with a specific call. The results are sorted chronologically, with the oldest recording segment appearing first in the list.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the call for which recordings are being retrieved.

get.description: Fetch a paginated list of calls associated with a specific Quo number and another number.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the Quo number associated with the call.
The unique identifier of the Quo user who either placed or received the call. Defaults to the workspace owner.

The phone numbers of participants involved in the call conversation, excluding your Quo number. Each number should contain the country code and conform to the E.164 format. Currently limited to one-to-one (1:1) conversations only.
DEPRECATED, use "createdAfter" or "createdBefore" instead. "since" incorrectly behaves as "createdBefore" and will be removed in an upcoming release.
Filter results to only include calls created after the specified date and time, in ISO 8601 format.
Filter results to only include calls created before the specified date and time, in ISO 8601 format.
Maximum number of results to return per page.

get.description: Get a call by its unique identifier.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the call.

get.summary: Get a summary for a call
get.description: Retrieve a detailed summary of a specific call identified by its unique call ID. This endpoint supports summaries for both regular calls and calls handled by Sona. Call summaries are only available on business and scale plans.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the call associated with the summary.

get.summary: Get a transcription for a call
get.description: Retrieve a detailed transcript of a specific call identified by its unique call ID. This endpoint supports transcripts for both regular calls and calls handled by Sona. Call transcripts are only available on business and scale plans.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the call associated with this transcript.

get.summary: Get a voicemail for a call
get.description: Retrieve a voicemail associated with a specific call. Returns null data fields while the voicemail is processing in our system. Returns competed data fields when the voicemail has finished processing.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the call for which a voicemail is being retrieved.

get.description: Custom contact fields enhance your Quo contacts with additional information beyond standard details like name, company, role, emails and phone numbers. These user-defined fields let you capture business-specific data. While you can only create or modify these fields in Quo itself, this endpoint retrieves your existing custom properties. Use this information to accurately map and include important custom data when creating new contacts via the API.

post.description: Create a contact for a workspace.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts. You can optionally filter the results by providing external IDs and sources. When no external IDs are provided, all contacts for the organization are returned.

items.description: A unique identifier from an external system that can optionally be supplied when creating a contact. This ID is used to associate the contact with records in other systems and is required for retrieving the contact later via the "List Contacts" endpoint. Ensure the `externalId` is unique and consistent across systems for accurate cross-referencing.

schema.description: Optional list of unique identifiers from an external system used to retrieve specific contacts. When provided, the result set is limited to contacts associated with the provided `externalIds`. These IDs must match those supplied during contact creation via the "Create Contacts" endpoint. When omitted, returns all contacts for the organization. Use this parameter to cross-reference and fetch contacts linked to external systems.

items.description: Indicates how the contact was created or where it originated from.

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific contact in your Quo workspace using the contact's unique identifier.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the contact.

patch.description: Modify an existing contact in your Quo workspace using the contact's unique identifier.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the contact.

delete.description: Delete a contact by its unique identifier.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the contact.

get.description: Fetch a paginated list of conversations of Quo conversations. Can be filtered by user and/or phone numbers. Defaults to all conversations in the Quo organization. Results are returned in descending order based on the most recent conversation.

schema.description: DEPRECATED, use `phoneNumbers` instead. If both `phoneNumber` and `phoneNumbers` are provided, `phoneNumbers` will be used. Filters results to only include conversations with the specified Quo phone number. Can be either your Quo phone number ID or the full phone number in E.164 format.
Filters results to only include conversations with the specified Quo phone numbers. Each item can be either an Quo phone number ID or a full phone number in E.164 format.
The unique identifier of the user the making the request. Used to filter results to only include the user's conversations.
Filter results to only include conversations created after the specified date and time, in ISO_8601 format.
Filter results to only include conversations created before the specified date and time, in ISO_8601 format.
Exclude inactive conversations from the results.
Filter results to only include conversations updated after the specified date and time, in ISO_8601 format.
Filter results to only include conversations updated before the specified date and time, in ISO_8601 format.
Maximum number of results to return per page.

post.description: Send a text message from your Quo number to a recipient.

get.description: Retrieve a chronological list of messages exchanged between your Quo number and specified participants, with support for filtering and pagination.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the Quo number used to send or receive the messages. PhoneNumberID can be retrieved via the Get Phone Numbers endpoint.
The unique identifier of the user the message was sent from.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

schema.description: Array of phone numbers involved in the conversation, excluding your Quo number, in E.164 format.
DEPRECATED, use "createdAfter" or "createdBefore" instead. "since" currently behaves as "createdBefore" and will be removed in an upcoming release.
Filter results to only include messages created after the specified date and time, in ISO_8601 format.
Filter results to only include messages created before the specified date and time, in ISO_8601 format.
Maximum number of results to return per page.

get.description: Get a message by its unique identifier.

schema.description: The unique identifier of a message

get.description: Retrieve the list of phone numbers and users associated with your Quo workspace.

schema.description: Filter results to return only phone numbers associated with the specified user"s unique identifier.

get.summary: Get a phone number by ID
get.description: Get a phone number by its unique identifier.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the phone number.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of users in your Quo workspace.

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific user in your Quo workspace using the user's unique identifier.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the user being retrieved.

get.description: List all webhooks for a user.

schema.description: The unique identifier the user. Defaults to the workspace owner.

get.description: Get a webhook by its unique identifier.

schema.description: The unique identifier of a webhook

delete.description: Delete a webhook by its unique identifier.

schema.description: The unique identifier of a webhook

post.summary: Create a new webhook for messages
post.description: Creates a new webhook that triggers on events from messages.

post.summary: Create a new webhook for calls
post.description: Creates a new webhook that triggers on events from calls.

post.summary: Create a new webhook for call summaries
post.description: Creates a new webhook that triggers on events from call summaries.

post.summary: Create a new webhook for call transcripts
post.description: Creates a new webhook that triggers on events from call transcripts.

id.description: The unique identifier of Quo phone number.

groupId.description: The unique identifier of the group to which the Quo number belongs.

portRequestId.description: Unique identifier for the phone number’s porting request, if applicable.

formattedNumber.description: A human-readable representation of a phone number.

forward.description: Forwarding number for incoming calls, null if no forwarding number is configured.

name.description: The display name of the phone number

number.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

portingStatus.description: Current status of the porting process, if applicable.

symbol.description: Custom symbol or emoji associated with the phone number.

role.description: The user's role in the organization.

groupId.description: The unique identifier of the group to which the user belongs.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the phone number was added to the account in ISO 8601 format.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the phone number's details in ISO 8601 format.

CA.description: The phone-number usage restriction status for a specific region

Intl.description: The phone-number usage restriction status for a specific region

US.description: The phone-number usage restriction status for a specific region

duration.description: The length of the call recording in seconds. Null if the recording is not completed or the duration is unknown.

id.description: The unique identifier of the call recording.

startTime.description: The timestamp when the recording began, in ISO 8601 format. Null if the recording hasn't started or the start time is unknown.

status.description: The current status of the call recording.

type.description: The file type of the call recording. Null if the type is not specified or is unknown.

url.description: The URL where the call recording can be accessed or downloaded. Null if the URL is not available or the recording is not accessible.

answeredAt.description: The timestamp when the call was answered in ISO 8601 format. Null if the call was not answered.

answeredBy.description: The unique identifier of the Quo user who answered the incoming call. Null for outgoing calls or unanswered incoming calls.

initiatedBy.description: The unique identifier of the Quo user who initiated the outgoing call. Null for incoming calls.

direction.description: The direction of the call relative to the Quo number.

status.description: The current status of the call.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the call ended, in ISO 8601 format. Null if the call is ongoing or was not completed.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the call record was created, in ISO 8601 format.

callRoute.description: "How the call reached the user's inbox: either by direct dial to their number or routed through a phone menu. Null for outbound calls."

duration.description: The total duration of the call in seconds.

aiHandled.description: Type of AI that answered the call. Set to 'ai-agent' for AI responses, or null for human responses.

id.description: The unique identifier of the call.

phoneNumberId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo number associated with the call.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the call record was last updated, in ISO 8601 format. Null if never updated.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo user account associated with the call.

totalItems.description: "Total number of items available. ⚠️ Note: `totalItems` is not accurately returning the total number of items that can be paginated. We are working on fixing this issue."

initiatedBy.description: The unique identifier of the Quo user who initiated the outgoing call. Null for incoming calls.

duration.description: The length of the call voicemail in seconds. Null if the voicemail is not completed or the duration is unknown.

id.description: The unique identifier of the call voicemail.

transcript.description: The transcript of the call voicemail. Null if the voicemail is not completed or the transcript is not available.

status.description: The current status of the call voicemail.

name.description: The name of the custom contact field. This name is set by users in the Quo interface when the custom field is created.

key.description: The identifying key for contact custom field.

type.description: The data type of the custom contact field, determining what kind of information can be stored and how it should be formatted.

source.description: "The contact's source. Defaults to `null` for contacts created in the UI. Defaults to `public-api` for contacts created via the public API. Setting the parameter to `'done'` would move the conversation to the Done inbox view.
